untranslatable_reason: Pattern definition requires visual loop formation touching trend line and partial rise/decline detection within formation, which cannot be operationalized with available indicators. Regime detection (BEAR_MARKET vs BULL_MARKET) is not part of allowed regime set. Success rates (54-80%) cannot be encoded as entry conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using trend line crossover (SMA_20 as proxy) and ADX for trend confirmation. Original pattern requires chart pattern recognition beyond indicator-based rules. The context-dependent direction and effectiveness in bear vs bull markets suggests regime-dependent strategy, but BEAR_MARKET and BULL_MARKET regimes are not in allowed set.
